Error.AttemptToOpenCUE4ParseJSON:
Failed to open this file! This file is likely an FModel/CUE4Parse JSON file, which cannot be directly loaded into UAssetGUI.

Please export assets to JSON using UAssetGUI (File -> Save As), or look into other tools such as JsonAsAsset (https://github.com/JsonAsAsset/JsonAsAsset) for interpreting CUE4Parse JSON.
Error.AttemptToOpenUEXP: Failed to open this file! This is a .uexp file, which cannot be read directly. Please open the respective .uasset file instead.
Error.AttemptToOpenZenUE5:
Failed to open this file! UE5 Zen Loader assets cannot be loaded directly into UAssetGUI. You could try to instead open the corresponding .utoc container file in UAssetGUI. You could also execute retoc directly from the command line.

Would you like to open the GitHub page for retoc?
Error.AttemptToOpenZenUE4:
Failed to open this file! UE4 Zen Loader assets cannot be loaded directly into UAssetGUI. You could try to instead open the corresponding .utoc container file in UAssetGUI. You could also execute retoc directly from the command line.

Would you like to open the GitHub page for retoc?
Error.AttemptToOpenUnknown: Failed to open this file! The file format is not recognized.
Error.BadEngineVersion: Failed to open this file! Please make sure the specified engine version is correct.
Error.NoEngineVersion: Please specify an engine version using the dropdown at the upper-right corner of this window before opening an unversioned asset.
Error.FailedToFindScript: Failed to find script on disk! {0}
Error.OpenContainerToStage: Please open a container file first to stage assets.
Error.NoMappings: No mappings found. If you have a .usmap file for this game, go to Utils --> Import Mappings... and select your .usmap file to import.
Notice.ACE7: This file uses Ace Combat 7 encryption and was decrypted in-situ.
Notice.DuplicateNameMapEntries: Encountered duplicate name map entries! Serialized FNames will coalesce to one of the entries in the map and binary equality may not be maintained.

Notice.UnversionedButNoMappings: Failed to parse unversioned properties! Exports cannot be parsed for this asset unless a valid set of mappings is provided. If you have a .usmap file for this game, go to Utils --> Import Mappings... and select your .usmap file to import.
Notice.FailedToAccessOtherAssets:
UAssetAPI attempted to access the following assets, but failed to do so. Some errors may potentially be resolved by giving it access to these assets. You can either include them in the same directory, or reconstruct the game's Content directory tree.

Notice.BinaryEquality: Failed to maintain binary equality! UAssetAPI may not be able to parse this particular asset correctly, and you may not be able to load this file in-game if modified.
Notice.ChildJumpFailed: Please select View -> Recalculate Nodes before attempting to jump to this node.
